ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate Set For 2/5/20.
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Mar-04-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Dinell Cross.

The Court stated that it is looking for a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Vann stated that it is an all cash estate, that four months ago he met with his Client and the other two Siblings, and that he discovered that they had a huge dispute when they found out that $450,000.00 went from the Decedent's account to a Siblings account. Mr. Vann also stated that an action was filed in Solano County against the Brother, that it is dismissed and now filed in San Francisco (CGC-19-578982), and that they want the Brother to give up his 1/3 interest in the credit union account and the Vallejo property. In addition, Mr. Vann stated that the Attorney in the civil matter is not responding, that just the complaint has been filed, that his Client is one of the Plaintiffs and that he does not represent his Client in the civil matter. Status on close of estate is continued to March 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Vann is to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration by February 26, 2020 and is to think about mediation.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Aug-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner and the Attorney to appear on August 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. If no appearance is made on that date, the petition will be taken off calendar. The Amended Petition for Letters of Administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-25-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-02-2018 Continued To May-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

Mr. Vann stated that he does not have notice for the supplement, that he has done a diligent search for the original will, that the Decedent had three folders (one for each Son) and that none of the folders had the original will. Mr. Vann also stated that the three Sons are in agreement to amend the petition for letters of administration and have distribution go equally three ways under the Trust. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 30, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of an amended petition.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
